name: Shenzhen Chengtian Weiye Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Chengtian Weiye Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, sells, and services smart cards in China and internationally. It offers telecommunication cards, financial IC cards, ID cards, etc. The company serves mobile communications, financial payments, and public utilities markets. Shenzhen Chengtian Weiye Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
